notes: v0.16.2 — HOME page redesign (News-Focused A). Hero strip with active-class ship texture (clickable → CLASS tab), GRINDARE STUDIO attribution chip + logo, animated cyan grid backdrop. Two-column body: PATCH NOTES feed on the left (driven by the in-game PATCH_NOTES const, color-coded by kind), DAILY / SEASON / ROADMAP / RECENT MATCHES stack on the right. Removed the QUICK MATCH button and the old 6-card grid. Windows only.
